channel.title: Git on MoonLab
channel.description: Recent content in Git on MoonLab

item.title: Git push results in permission denied error 403
item.description: When trying to use git push -u origin main, a permission error occurred, indicating that the old user was denied access. To resolve this issue, the author attempted to reset the commit author using git commit --amend --reset-author, but the problem persisted. Ultimately, a solution was found on Stack Overflow： deleting the old credentials successfully resolved the issue, saving an hour of time.
